beats.scene_description:
Wide establishing shot of a bedroom at dawn. Soft golden light pours
through gauze curtains, casting dappled tree-leaf shadows on the
opposite wall. A bedside table with a phone face-down, a clock
showing 6:47, and a small succulent. Bedsheets rumpled, no figure
yet. Camera POV from foot of bed looking up.

Close-up on a hand — fingers gently wrapping a ceramic cup of tea.
Steam curls upward. Daylight catches the rim. The hand is still.

Medium shot of Mira's face — eyes open, looking just slightly
downward at the tea. She's calm. Cream sweater visible. Hair loose.

POV from Mira's angle. The phone screen has lit up. The notification
banner reads: "Re: Q3 review — 10am". Subject line bold. The phone
is face-down except for the edge-glow. The cup is still in frame at
the bottom edge.

Tight close-up on Mira's chest area, sweater visible, slight tension
lines suggested in the fabric and posture. A soft blur of motion at
the edges to imply quickening pulse — not loud, not red, just felt.

Close on Mira's face. The calm has just shifted. Eyes a little
wider. Lips closed. Not afraid yet — alerted.

Hand back to the teacup. Steam still rising. Same composition as
panel 2 — a deliberate visual rhyme. The scene is quiet again.

Pull-back wide. Mira at a small kitchen table, both hands around
the cup. Window behind her, sun rising. Tree-leaf shadows swaying
on the wall. A houseplant (monstera) on the sill.

Macro on the cup, the tea inside still warm. A hint of Mira's hand
and the kitchen wall.

Mira opens a laptop. The screen reflects her face. Calendar app
showing today: "10:00 AM — Q3 Review (DM)." Several other small
calendar blocks crowd the morning.

Mid-distance. Mira's face. Multiple thought balloons (cloud_thought
bubbles, varying sizes, overlapping like clouds gathering) float
around her — each carrying a fragment of catastrophizing thought.
Background slightly dimmed.

Close on Mira's hand on the table. It trembles, very slightly.
The tea in the cup ripples.

Wide. Mira looks up — the kitchen window. A small finch has landed
on the outer sill. Sunlight through the glass.

Close on the bird. Head-tilt. Eye visible. The bird is real, alive,
in this moment. Soft gold light on its feathers.

Mira's face — looking at the bird. The shoulders have softened a
fraction. Her lips part slightly. Not a smile yet.

FLASHBACK PALETTE — desaturated, cool grey-blue. A conference room.
Mira at a long table. Faces around her are blurred (intentional —
panel does not name who is in the room). Mira's posture is upright
but her gaze is down at her notebook.

Same flashback palette. Hidden under the conference table — Mira's
fist clenched in her lap.

Back to PRESENT palette — Mira at the kitchen table. Her hand
flexes. Releases. Stretches the fingers.

Close — Mira lifts the cup, takes a sip. Steam on her upper lip.
Eyes nearly closed.

Eyes fully closed now. Faint smile. Inhale visible — sweater rises
a fraction.

Same composition. Sweater settles. Eyes still closed. Long, slow
exhale.

Mira opens her eyes. Looks up at the ceiling. POV — the ceiling.
A small smoke detector with a steady green LED. Otherwise unmarked.
Mira's face — looking up. Contemplative now, no longer braced.
Wider — Mira and the ceiling and the kitchen, light fuller now.
Close on the smoke detector LED. The green is steady.
Mira's eyes. Tracking the thought.

Wider — kitchen counter. The kettle is still on. Steam curls up
from the spout. The steam reaches near the ceiling.

Mira's face. The teaching has landed. Not relief — recognition.
Eyes a little soft.

Wide silent panel. Mira at the kitchen table, kettle steaming on
the counter, morning light fuller than before, the houseplant
casting a long leaf-shadow across the wall. Empty space at the
top and bottom of the panel — composition designed to read as
"everything paused for a moment." NO TEXT, NO SFX, NO CAPTION.

Close — hand on the cup again. Steam continues. Same composition
as panel 2, intentional bookend.

Mira's face. Just barely a smile. Eyes soft. Not transformed.
Not fixed. Just here.
Empty wall, light moving across it. A small caption space.

Close on the smoke detector LED — steady green. The same as before.
Same alarm. Different relationship to it.

Wide pull. The whole kitchen. Sunlight stronger now. The bird is
gone — that's fine. Mira is simply at the table. Cream sweater,
the cup, the laptop closed. The plant. The light.

Final small panel — typographic only on a soft cream background.
Episode card.
